# Analysis of Discord Chat in "🌎│worlds" Channel

## 1. Summary
The chat contains a brief discussion from user Enryt about a "portals-square proposal." Enryt suggests connecting this proposal to the existing Hyperfy learning environment (learn.hyperfy.xyz) where users can practice using the platform. They propose adding educational elements like panels or an NPC character with wiki-like functionality to teach newcomers about Hyperfy's features, performance benefits, and advantages as an open-source VR framework compared to other platforms. Enryt also suggests implementing a voting system on Discord to select the most suitable portals for inclusion.

## 2. FAQ
Q: How could portals be selected for the portals-square proposal? (asked by Enryt) A: Through upvoting on Discord (answered by Enryt)

## 3. Help Interactions
No significant help interactions were present in this brief chat segment.

## 4. Action Items
Feature: Connect portals-square proposal to existing Hyperfy learning environment | Description: Integrate with learn.hyperfy.xyz as a starting point | Mentioned By: Enryt
Feature: Add educational elements about Hyperfy | Description: Implement panels and/or Wiki-NPC to teach newcomers about features and advantages | Mentioned By: Enryt
Feature: Create portal selection system | Description: Implement Discord upvoting mechanism for choosing suitable portals | Mentioned By: Enryt
